title: Dashboard loading spinner never dismisses on error
user_comment: the spinner just spins forever when the API fails — no error state, no retry button, nothing. i have to refresh the whole page
orchestrator_take: Silent failure on API error — no feedback loop. Violates Nielsen H1 (visibility of system status) and H9 (help users recognize errors).
observed: Fetch error triggers no UI state change
expected: Spinner hides; error banner shown with retry

title: Skill argument hint missing for /cab:execute-task
user_comment: would be helpful if typing /cab:execute-task showed me what args are expected before i hit enter
orchestrator_take: Missing argument-hint frontmatter field on skill — ergonomics gap not a functional bug.
observed: Skill shows no inline arg hint

title: verifier agent called but produced no acceptance-criteria output
user_comment: In the past 2 sessions verifier agent was invoked but its summary didn't cite plan acceptance criteria — verification is running but not verifying the right things
orchestrator_take: Verifier agent behavior drifted from its system-prompt contract — symptoms match LL-12 (background agents can't write) cascade.
observed: Verifier produces generic pass/fail without per-criterion verdict

title: Add plugin.json schema validator to /validate --cab-audit
user_comment: would be great if cab-audit also linted plugin.json for required fields + valid enum values instead of just structural checks
orchestrator_take: Schema validation strengthens marketplace-readiness gate — wrapper philosophy: use CC's existing schema.

title: KB files reference official CC docs via URLs that change — no versioning
user_comment: LL-10 mandates fresh-fetch but doesn't specify which CC-docs revision a KB file was last aligned against — drift is invisible
orchestrator_take: Version-anchoring gap in kb-conventions — potential LL candidate after 1 more occurrence (follows LL-11 pattern recognition).
observed: No versioning metadata on source: URLs
